dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5882 IH: No Tricks on Treats Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Jacobs (for herself and Mrs. Luna) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act to include food containing dyes, flavoring, and sweeteners as misbranded unless the packaging of such food states such fact.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Tricks on Treats Act of 2025.

section.header: Inclusion of food containing dyes, flavoring, and sweeteners as misbranded
section.text: Section 403 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (21 U.S.C. 343) is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: If, in the case of food other than a dietary supplement, such food bears or contains any synthetic dye, or any added artificial or natural flavoring, unless such fact is prominently stated on the principal display panel of the packaging of such food.
For the purposes of this paragraph, the term synthetic dye means a batch-certified dye subject to certification under part 74 of title 21, Code of Federal Regulations (or any successor regulations).

subsection.text: If, in the case of food other than a dietary supplement, such food bears or contains any nonnutritive sweetener, unless such fact is prominently stated on the principal display panel of the packaging of such food.
